name: IT Support Agent
description: A specialist IT troubleshooting agent for Zava Insurance employees — handles device issues, software problems, network connectivity, and IT service requests with deep knowledge base access.

disclaimer.text: I'm an AI assistant — for urgent IT issues or security incidents, contact the IT Helpdesk directly at ext. 4357.

conversation_starters.title: Monitor Not Working
conversation_starters.text: My laptop won't connect to the external monitor — I've tried two different cables.

conversation_starters.title: VPN Issues
conversation_starters.text: I can't connect to the VPN from home. It keeps timing out.

conversation_starters.title: Software Access
conversation_starters.text: I need access to the Claims Management System. How do I request it?

conversation_starters.title: Password Reset
conversation_starters.text: My account got locked out after too many failed login attempts.

conversation_starters.title: Printer Setup
conversation_starters.text: How do I connect to the office printer on the 3rd floor?
